ai_summary: Marcelle would handle bullying by speaking privately with each child, maintaining confidentiality while escalating to administration and parents if serious. She brings a nurturing, individualized approach to teaching, focusing on emotional health, intrinsic motivation, and creating a safe, creative environment where kids develop a lasting love for learning.
